title: A brand new leak
description: you wont have read this anywhere else

title: Trailer palm tree may confirm 47 separate endings, say men with rulers.
description: A shadow, a leaf, and what might be a seagull have convinced our panel that every mission will branch into either crime, karaoke, or responsible parking.

title: Retail listing briefly promises realistic traffic cone emotions.
description: The page vanished within minutes, which proves either a cover-up or that someone needed to fix the spelling of vehicular melancholy.

title: Vice beaches prepare for influx of people photographing puddles.
description: Residents have been advised not to stand near reflective surfaces, neon signs, or suspiciously high-resolution scooters with surprisingly detailed suspension.

title: Scientists discover fans can hear release dates in ambient synth pads.
description: The breakthrough came after one listener slowed the trailer by 0.5 percent and heard what experts describe as probably a drum.

title: Insider says every NPC has a mortgage and a favourite crisp flavour.
description: We cannot verify this, but our source was wearing sunglasses indoors, which is the highest known credential in games journalism.
